this_title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City Season 1
trans_title: 盐湖城娇妻 第一季
introduction: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City (abbreviated RHOSLC) is an American reality television series that premiered on November 11, 2020, on Bravo. Developed as the tenth installment of The Real Housewives franchise, it focuses on the personal and professional lives of several women residing in Salt Lake City, Utah.The cast consists of Lisa Barlow, Mary Cosby, Heather Gay, Meredith Marks, Whitney Rose and Jen Shah.
chinese_title: 盐湖城娇妻 第一季
foreign_title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City Season 1
